reviews.review_description:
Boxed Out is a clever and highly addictive VR puzzle game.
Easy to learn, but challenging to master, it offers great pacing and excellent visual clarity in VR.
Perfect for quick sessions or chasing high scores, this is a very polished and enjoyable experience.

Matching block puzzle games have been a staple in gaming forever but we all know VR makes everything better! With multiple play options in survival mode and a more relaxing solitaire mode, this will keep your brain and reflexes sharp!
There's also a hidden Easter egg island to explore!
Definitely a must buy for puzzle fans!

Check out my gameplay video over on my YouTube to see more.
😁✌️☮️❤️

What makes Boxed Out great is that it takes full use of being a VR game. You're not just trying to solve the puzzle, you're *in* the puzzle. Jumping up and walking around gives you an entirely new perspective on the game, especially when you can't see a move that will collapse that seemingly impossible group of blocks! And like all great block based puzzle games (including the most obvious one!), it's impossible to play just one game. You can't help coming back for more. Highly recommended!
